evals.prompt: 这篇论文已经 resolve 了，请把 raw 补齐到 ~/papers/{title_slug}，包括 PDF、paper.md 和 repo 搜索结果。
evals.expected_output: Hydrate the canonical raw bundle without writing a reading note.
expectations: The output includes a PDF file under paper/paper.pdf
The output includes paper.md under paper/paper.md
The output includes repo_search.json or repo discovery results in metadata
No reading-note.md is created by this skill
The metadata.yaml is updated with assets information

evals.prompt: 如果有 LaTeX 就优先用 pandoc 生成 paper.md，否则再回退到 PDF -> MinerU。
evals.expected_output: Apply the new normalization backend policy and write paper/paper.md.
expectations: If LaTeX is available, paper.md is generated via pandoc from LaTeX
If no LaTeX, paper.md is generated via PDF -> MinerU fallback
The metadata includes a normalization section with backend info

evals.prompt: 这篇论文 repo 不一定找得到，但无论如何要把 repo_search.json 写出来。
evals.expected_output: Keep repo discovery evidence even when no confident repository can be cloned.
expectations: The output includes repo_search.json or repo_search in metadata
The repo search results include a candidates list even if empty
If no medium/high confidence repo is found, the selected field is null but candidates are preserved
The skill does not fail when no repo can be cloned
